---
name: 5.backend-unit-tests-and-coverage
description: >
  Use this prompt to generate complete unit and integration test cases for all backend projects
  (Domain, Application, Infrastructure, Api) and run them with code coverage reporting.
  Fills missing tests, achieves 90% line/branch/method coverage, and logs results to coverage-logs/.
agent: Testing Agent
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
tools: [execute, read, write, editFiles, edit, search, todo]
---

Generate complete unit tests for every backend project and run them with code coverage.
Follow the AAA pattern (Arrange / Act / Assert) and the naming convention `MethodName_StateUnderTest_ExpectedBehaviour`.

---

## Step 1 — Read Before Writing

Read the following source files before generating any test:

**Domain**
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Domain/Entities/Policy.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Domain/Enums/` — all enum files
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Domain/Exceptions/` — all domain exception files
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Domain/Interfaces/IPolicyRepository.cs`

**Application**
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/Services/PolicyService.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/Interfaces/IPolicyService.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/DTOs/PolicyDto.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/DTOs/PolicySummaryDto.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/DTOs/BulkFlagRequest.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/Models/PolicyFilterQuery.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/Models/PagedResult.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Application/Validators/` — all validator files

**Api**
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Api/Controllers/PoliciesController.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Api/Middleware/GlobalExceptionMiddleware.cs`
- `src/backend/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Api/Converters/LineOfBusinessJsonConverter.cs`

**Existing Tests (read first — only fill gaps, never duplicate)**
- `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyServiceTests.cs`
- `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyEntityTests.cs`
- `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/BulkFlagRequestValidatorTests.cs`
- `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyFilterQueryValidatorTests.cs`
- `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Integration/PoliciesControllerIntegrationTests.cs`

---

## Step 2 — Unit Tests: Domain Layer

Write or extend `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyEntityTests.cs`. Cover:
- All entity property assignments and default values
- All domain exception types — verify `Message` and `PolicyId` properties
- All enum values defined and correctly named
- Any domain validation logic on `Policy`

---

## Step 3 — Unit Tests: Application Layer (PolicyService)

Write or extend `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyServiceTests.cs` using:
```csharp
var mockRepo = new Mock<IPolicyRepository>();
var logger = NullLogger<PolicyService>.Instance;
var sut = new PolicyService(mockRepo.Object, logger);
```

Required test cases (add any missing):

| Method | Scenario | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | No filters | Returns paged result |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | `status=Active` filter | Only Active records |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | `lineOfBusiness` filter | Filtered records |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | `region` filter | Filtered records |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | Date range filter | Records within range |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | `search` free-text | Matches policyNumber, policyholderName, underwriter |
| `GetPoliciesAsync` | `page=2, size=10` | Correct offset applied |
| `GetByIdAsync` | Valid UUID exists | Returns `PolicyDto` |
| `GetByIdAsync` | UUID not found | Throws `PolicyNotFoundException` |
| `BulkFlagPoliciesAsync` | Valid ID list | Calls repository, returns count |
| `BulkFlagPoliciesAsync` | Empty ID list | Returns 0, no repository call |
| `GetSummaryAsync` | Records present | Correct counts per status and LOB |
| `GetSummaryAsync` | Empty database | Zeroed summary |

---

## Step 4 — Unit Tests: Validators

Extend `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/BulkFlagRequestValidatorTests.cs`:
- Empty `PolicyIds` list → validation failure
- Null `PolicyIds` → validation failure
- Valid GUIDs list → passes validation

Extend `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PolicyFilterQueryValidatorTests.cs`:
- `page=0` → failure; `size=0` → failure; `size > 100` → failure
- `status` not in allowed enum values → failure
- `lineOfBusiness` not in allowed values → failure
- `effectiveDateFrom > effectiveDateTo` → failure
- All defaults valid → passes

---

## Step 5 — Unit Tests: Api Controllers

Create `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/PoliciesControllerTests.cs` if missing.
Use a mocked `IPolicyService` — do NOT use `WebApplicationFactory` here.

Cover:
- `GetPolicies` → 200 with paged response when service returns data
- `GetPolicies` → 200 with empty list when no records match
- `GetPolicyById` → 200 with `PolicyDto` when found
- `GetPolicyById` → 404 ProblemDetails when `PolicyNotFoundException` thrown
- `BulkFlagPolicies` → 204 on success
- `BulkFlagPolicies` → 400 on invalid request
- `GetSummary` → 200 with `PolicySummaryDto`

---

## Step 6 — Unit Tests: Middleware and Converters

Create `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/GlobalExceptionMiddlewareTests.cs` if missing:
- Unhandled exception → RFC 7807 ProblemDetails, status 500
- `PolicyNotFoundException` → 404 ProblemDetails
- No exception → middleware passes through, returns original response

Create `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit/LineOfBusinessJsonConverterTests.cs` if missing:
- Each valid `LineOfBusiness` value serialises and deserialises correctly
- Unknown string → throws `JsonException` per implementation

---

## Step 7 — Integration Tests: All 4 Endpoints

Write or extend `src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Integration/PoliciesControllerIntegrationTests.cs`
using `WebApplicationFactory<Program>` with an in-memory or SQLite database seeded with known test data.

| Endpoint | Scenario | Assert |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /api/v1/policies` | Default | 200, `data` array present |
| `GET /api/v1/policies?status=Active` | Status filter | 200, all records `status=Active` |
| `GET /api/v1/policies?lineOfBusiness=Marine` | LOB filter | 200, all records match LOB |
| `GET /api/v1/policies?search=POL` | Free-text | 200, results contain search term |
| `GET /api/v1/policies?page=1&size=5` | Pagination | 200, `data.length <= 5` |
| `GET /api/v1/policies/{validId}` | Found | 200, correct `id` in body |
| `GET /api/v1/policies/{unknownId}` | Not found | 404, RFC 7807 body with `status=404` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/policies/flag` | Valid IDs | 204, no body |
| `PATCH /api/v1/policies/flag` | Empty body | 400, RFC 7807 body |
| `GET /api/v1/policies/summary` | Any data | 200, `totalPolicies` field present |

---

## Step 8 — Verify Coverage Configuration

Ensure `Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit.csproj` contains:
```xml
<CollectCoverage>true</CollectCoverage>
<CoverletOutputFormat>opencover</CoverletOutputFormat>
<CoverletOutput>$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)..\..\..\..\coverage-logs\coverage.opencover.xml</CoverletOutput>
<Threshold>90</Threshold>
<ThresholdType>line,branch,method</ThresholdType>
<ThresholdStat>total</ThresholdStat>
<ExcludeByFile>**/Migrations/*.cs,**/*.Designer.cs</ExcludeByFile>
```

Ensure `Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Integration.csproj` contains:
```xml
<CollectCoverage>true</CollectCoverage>
<CoverletOutputFormat>cobertura</CoverletOutputFormat>
<CoverletOutput>$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)..\..\..\..\coverage-logs\coverage.integration.cobertura.xml</CoverletOutput>
<Threshold>90</Threshold>
<ThresholdType>line,branch,method</ThresholdType>
<ThresholdStat>total</ThresholdStat>
<ExcludeByFile>**/Migrations/*.cs,**/*.Designer.cs</ExcludeByFile>
```

---

## Step 9 — Run Tests and Report Coverage

```bash
# Unit tests
dotnet test src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Unit `
  --configuration Release `
  --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" `
  --results-directory coverage-logs

# Integration tests
dotnet test src/backend/tests/Chubb.PolicyManagement.Tests.Integration `
  --configuration Release `
  --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" `
  --results-directory coverage-logs

# Log summary to coverage-logs/coverage-history.md
pwsh -File scripts/log-coverage.ps1 -CoverageDir coverage-logs
```

After running, report:
1. Total tests: passed / failed / skipped per project
2. Line, branch, and method coverage % per project
3. Any method still below 90% threshold — generate the missing tests before completing this task
